sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0
update TransX set BusCat = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = 'XX'
update TransX set Qtr = 2 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co < '5990'
update TransX set TransCode = '', PTF = '', ProdCode = '', CCcat = substring(CC,4,1) where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Qtr = 2

insert into TransX (KeyID, Qtr, Co, GL, PC, CCcat, TP, BusCat, TTY, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, Amt4) (select KeyID, 0 as Qtr, Co, GL, PC, CCcat, TP, BusCat, TTY, round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt1-Amt2),2) as Amt2, round(sum(Amt1-Amt3),2) as Amt3, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt4 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Qtr = 2 group by KeyID, Co, GL, PC, CCcat, TP, BusCat, TTY)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Qtr = 2

insert into TransX (KeyID, Qtr, Co, GL, PC, CCcat, TP, BusCat, TTY, TransCode, PTF, ProdCode, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, Amt4) (select KeyID, 4 as Qtr, Co, GL, PC, CCcat, TP, BusCat, TTY, TransCode, PTF, ProdCode, round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt1-Amt2),2) as Amt2, round(sum(Amt1-Amt3),2) as Amt3, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt4 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Qtr = 1 group by KeyID, Co, GL, PC, CCcat, TP, BusCat, TTY, TransCode, PTF, ProdCode)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Qtr = 1
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0 and Amt4 = 0

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, PC, TP, BusCat, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, Amt4) (select '[batchID]-data2', Co, GL, PC, TP, BusCat, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2, round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3, round(sum(Amt4),2) as Amt4 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Qtr = 0 and GL >= '5410000' and GL <= '5599999' group by Co, GL, PC, TP, BusCat)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, PC, TP, BusCat, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, Amt4) (select '[batchID]-data2', Co, GL, PC, TP, BusCat, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2, round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3, round(sum(Amt4),2) as Amt4 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Qtr = 0 and GL like '982%' group by Co, GL, PC, TP, BusCat)
update TransX set Division = p.Division,  Region = p.Region from TransX t inner join PCTRS p on t.PC = p.PCTR where KeyID = '[batchID]-data2'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Division, Region, TP, BusCat, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, Amt4) (select KeyID, Co, GL, Division, Region, TP, BusCat, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2, round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3, round(sum(Amt4),2) as Amt4 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data2' and GL like '982%' group by KeyID,Co, GL, Division, Region, TP, BusCat)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data2' and PC is NULL
insert into TransX (KeyID, PC, Amt1) (select '[batchID]-data3', PC, round(sum(Amt4),2) as Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Qtr = 0 and substring(GL,1,3) = '287' group by PC)

update TransX set PCdesc = p.Descr, Hierarchy = p.Hierarchy, Division = p.Division,  Region = p.Region, Location = p.Location, Zone = p.Zone from TransX t inner join PCTRS p on t.PC = p.PCTR where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' and Amt1 = 0

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, CCcat, TP, BusCat, TTY, TransCode, PTF, ProdCode, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, Amt4) (select KeyID, Co, GL, CCcat, TP, BusCat, TTY, '' as TransCode, '' as PTF, '' as ProdCode, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2, round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3, round(sum(Amt4),2) as Amt4 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Qtr = 0 group by KeyID, Co, GL, PC, CCcat, TP, BusCat, TTY)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Qtr is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID like '[batchID]%' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0 and Amt4 = 0
Insert into TransX select * from TransHist where KeyID = 'Hist 2023-12'
update TransX set KeyID = '[batchID]' where KeyID = 'Hist 2023-12'

update a set a.Flex1 = b.OS_GL, a.GLdesc = Substring(b.OS_GL_Desc,1,50), a.Flex2 = b.Flow, a.PCdesc = b.Interco, a.Flex3 = b.UD1, a.Flex4 = b.UD2, a.Flex5 = b.UD3, a.Flex6 = b.UD4, a.Flex7 = b.UD5 
		from TransX a left join osAccountMap3 b on a.GL >= b.GL_From and a.GL <= b.GL_Thru and a.Co >= b.Co_From and a.Co <= b.Co_Thru and REPLACE(REPLACE(a.TTY,'991','990'),'992','990') = b.TTY and CASE WHEN a.BusCat >= 20 and a.BusCat <=34 THEN SUBSTRING(a.BusCat,1,1) + '0' ELSE a.BusCat END = b.BC_From and (a.TP = b.TP_From or (len(a.TP) = 4 and b.TP_From = 'O') 
		or (a.TP like 'F%' and b.TP_From = 'F')) where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update a set a.Flex1 = b.OS_GL, a.GLdesc = Substring(b.OS_GL_Desc,1,50), a.Flex2 = b.Flow, a.PCdesc = b.Interco, a.Flex3 = b.UD1, a.Flex4 = b.UD2, a.Flex5 = b.UD3, a.Flex6 = b.UD4, a.Flex7 = b.UD5 
		from TransX a left join osAccountMap3 b on a.GL >= b.GL_From and a.GL <= b.GL_Thru and a.Co >= b.Co_From and a.Co <= b.Co_Thru and REPLACE(REPLACE(a.TTY,'991','990'),'992','990') = b.TTY and b.BC_From = '' 
		and (a.TP = b.TP_From or (len(a.TP) = 4 and b.TP_From = 'O') or (a.TP like 'F%' and b.TP_From = 'F')) where a.Flex1 is null and KeyID = '[batchID]'

update a set a.Flex1 = b.OS_GL, a.GLdesc = Substring(b.OS_GL_Desc,1,50), a.Flex2 = b.Flow, a.PCdesc = b.Interco, a.Flex3 = b.UD1, a.Flex4 = b.UD2, a.Flex5 = b.UD3, a.Flex6 = b.UD4, a.Flex7 = b.UD5 
		from TransX a left join osAccountMap3 b on a.GL >= b.GL_From and a.GL <= b.GL_Thru and a.Co >= b.Co_From and a.Co <= b.Co_Thru and REPLACE(REPLACE(a.TTY,'991','990'),'992','990') like b.TTY and b.BC_From = '' 
		and (a.TP = b.TP_From or (len(a.TP) = 4 and b.TP_From = 'O') or (a.TP like 'F%' and b.TP_From = 'F')) where a.Flex1 is null and KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set FSitem = Flex1, CCdesc = GLdesc, ExpNode = Flex2, Txt = PCdesc, RefKey1 = Flex3, RefKey2 = Flex4, RefKey3 = Flex5, ReinLoc = Flex6, RiskTerr = Flex7 where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set ExpNode = 'F30' + SUBSTRING(TTY,2,2) where TTY like '6%'and ExpNode = 'TTY' and KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set RefKey1 = ProdCode where RefKey1 = 'PCODE' and KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set RefKey3 = PTF where RefKey3 = 'PTF' and KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set RiskTerr = TransCode where RiskTerr = 'TCODE' and KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set RiskTerr = 'None' where RiskTerr = '' and KeyID = '[batchID]'

update TransX set Fsitem = '2052', CCdesc = '', ExpNode = 'F9000', Txt = '', RefKey1 = 'None', RefKey2 = 'None', RefKey3 = 'None', ReinLoc = 'None', RiskTerr = 'None' where ((GL >= '2550001' and GL <= '2550002')) and KeyID = '[batchID]'

update a set a.Fsitem = '2178', a.CCdesc = '', a.ExpNode = 'F9000', a.Txt = '', a.RefKey1 = 'None', a.RefKey2 = 'None', a.RefKey3 = 'None', a.ReinLoc = 'None', a.RiskTerr = 'None' from TransX a left join Misc_Tables b on a.GL >= b.Descr and a.GL <= b.Field1 where b.Table_ID = 'IR17' and b.ID='R63_OS_2178'

update a set a.Fsitem = '2178', a.CCdesc = '', a.ExpNode = 'F9000', a.Txt = '', a.RefKey1 = 'None', a.RefKey2 = 'None', a.RefKey3 = 'None', a.ReinLoc = 'None', a.RiskTerr = 'None' from TransX a left join Misc_Tables b on a.GL >= b.Descr and a.GL <= b.Field1 where a.Co<>'1000' and b.Table_ID = 'IR17' and b.ID='R63_OS_2178x1000'

update TransX set Fsitem = '6045', CCdesc = '', ExpNode = 'None', Txt = '', RefKey1 = 'None', RefKey2 = 'None', RefKey3 = 'None', ReinLoc = 'None', RiskTerr = 'None' where ((GL >= '4416001' and GL <= '4416005')) and KeyID = '[batchID]'

update TransX set Fsitem = '7350', CCdesc = 'Other', ExpNode = 'None', Txt = '', RefKey1 = 'None', RefKey2 = 'None', RefKey3 = 'None', ReinLoc = 'None', RiskTerr = 'None' where ((GL >= '4397000' and GL <= '4397002') OR (GL >= '4398001' and GL <= '4398001') OR (GL >= '4398007' and GL <= '4398007') OR (GL >= '4398013' and GL <= '4398014')) and KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set ReinLoc = 'U4048' where ReinLoc in ('U4045','U4050','U4070') and KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Fsitem = '2105' where Fsitem = '2032'
update a set a.Flex8 = b.MapKey from TransX a left join MapKeyRanges b on a.Flex1 >= b.FromGL and a.Flex1 <= b.ThruGL where b.Mapkey like 'O1-_-%-%-%' and not b.Mapkey like 'O1-_-%-%-%-%'
update a set a.Flex9 = b.MapKey from TransX a left join MapKeyRanges b on a.Fsitem >= b.FromGL and a.Fsitem <= b.ThruGL where b.Mapkey like 'O1-_-%-%-%' and not b.Mapkey like 'O1-_-%-%-%-%'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set KeyID = '[batchID]' where KeyID = '[batchID]-save'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0 and Amt4 = 0

sqlSelect.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, Qtr, Co, GL, PC, CC, TP, BusCat, TTY, ProdCode, PTF, TransCode, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) values ('[batchID]',[pass],
